name: wa_contractor_license
description: Look up Washington State contractor registration and license status via WA L&I. Accepts a business name, license ID (e.g. MORTESL763NR), or 9-digit UBI number. Returns action=found (match returned), action=pick (multiple matches — narrow the query), action=none (no match), or action=reject (bad input). Use this to verify that a contractor hired for work in WA has an active license, check for safety or contractor violations, or look up license details before hiring. Covers construction contractors, electricians, plumbers, HVAC, roofers, and all other WA-licensed contractor types.

query.description: Business name, license ID, or UBI. Examples: 'Acme Plumbing', 'MORTESL763NR', '605417027'. For name searches, partial names work but may return many results. License ID searches return exact matches only.

action.description: found — license(s) returned, results[] is populated; pick — multiple matches, present to user or narrow query; none — no license found for this query; refine — network issue, retry; reject — bad input, don't retry

total_found.description: Total matching records in L&I database (may exceed results[] length).

detail_url.description: Link to full license detail on WA L&I

exit_codes.1: action=pick/none/refine — multiple matches or no match
exit_codes.2: action=reject — bad input, do not retry
